title: HMF Bathroom Storage Basket, Braided Water Hyacinth Seagrass, Set of 2, 38 x 15 x 14 cm
features: Sustainable – 2 x rectangular wicker baskets made from renewable raw materials for everyday storage
Practical - Small, narrow basket for three toilet rolls or for organising other items
Cosy - decorative basket in natural design for everyday use in the bathroom, living room, bedroom or kitchen
Handmade - shelf basket hand-woven from water hyacinth with metal frame for more stability
Dimensions (W x D x H): outside: 38 x 15 x 14 cm | interior: 36 x 13 x 13 cm | weight: 0.45 kg
description: Product Description Hand-woven storage basket Stylish organisation and decoration This practical water hyacinth basket is perfect for storing small items or as a stylish decorative element. The hand-woven baskets lend every room a warm, inviting atmosphere and are both functional and aesthetically appealing. Ideal for any room! Sorting and organisation Decorative basket in a space-saving format and natural design for storing up to 3 toilet rolls or other small items such as towels, cosmetics, medicines, cables, books, etc. Dimensions (W x D x H): Exterior: 38 x 15 x 14 cm, Interior: 36 x 13 x 13 cm, Weight: 0.45 kg Narrow storage box Create a cosy atmosphere in your bathroom, kitchen, living room or bedroom with these rectangular woven baskets. Naturally beautiful and sustainably organised! The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. Creates a warm and cosy atmosphere The sustainable, hand-woven water hyacinth is a stylish natural product. Suitable for 3 toilet rolls A practical solution for storing up to three toilet rolls. Metal frame & hand-woven hyacinth Hand-woven basket, sturdily reinforced with a metal frame. Tidiness in your home For everyday items such as towels, cosmetics, toys, etc. Next page 1 Space-saving format 2 Natural aesthetics 3 Perfectly stowed away 4 Stable & versatile 5 Organise & Decorate MODERN AND SUSTAINABLE – THE STORAGE BASKET FROM HMF This practical rectangular woven basket combines sustainability and style in one. Hand-woven from fast-growing water hyacinth and reinforced with a sturdy metal frame, the basket is ideal for storage in the bathroom, living room, bedroom, children's room or kitchen. The narrow format offers space for up to three toilet rolls or helps to organise everyday items clearly. With its natural design, the basket creates a cosy atmosphere in any room. At the same time, it is particularly easy to care for and can be cleaned effortlessly with a damp cloth. Now you can organise decoratively and furnish sustainably! Natural raw material Water hyacinth Products made from water hyacinth are diverse. The plant's robust fibres are characterised by their natural aesthetics and durability. Using water hyacinth prevents methane emissions and binds CO2, so when you buy products made from water hyacinth, you are actively contributing to climate protection. The biodegradable properties of water hyacinth make it a sustainable choice.
